scripts.dist:mac:arm64:no-notarize: CSC_LINK= CSC_KEY_PASSWORD= SIGNBOARD_SKIP_NOTARIZATION=1 npm run build:js && CSC_LINK= CSC_KEY_PASSWORD= SIGNBOARD_SKIP_NOTARIZATION=1 electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:all: npm run dist:mac:arm64 && npm run dist:mac:x64 && npm run dist:mac:universal
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --win nsis --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run dist:win:x64 && npm run dist:win:arm64
scripts.dist:linux:x64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:all: npm run dist:linux:x64 && npm run dist:linux:arm64
scripts.dist:linux:rpm:x64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --linux rpm --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:rpm:arm64: npm run build:js && electron-builder --linux rpm --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:rpm:all: npm run build:js && electron-builder --linux rpm --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:mac:all && npm run dist:win:all && npm run dist:linux:all
scripts.release:prepare: npm run dist:all && npm run release:verify
